package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for bytes_hasprefix_manual_slice_after_len: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Manual `len` and slice prefix checks instead of `bytes.HasPrefix(...)`.
type CaseBytesHasprefixManualSliceAfterLenDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseBytesHasprefixManualSliceAfterLenModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseBytesHasprefixManualSliceAfterLenRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseBytesHasprefixManualSliceAfterLenModel
}

type CaseBytesHasprefixManualSliceAfterLenService struct {
    repo *CaseBytesHasprefixManualSliceAfterLenRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseBytesHasprefixManualSliceAfterLenAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeBytesHasprefixManualSliceAfterLen(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseBytesHasprefixManualSliceAfterLenDTO) error {
    focus := "bytes_hasprefix_manual_slice_after"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    _ = bytes.HasPrefix(buf, []byte("pre"))
    copied := make([]CaseBytesHasprefixManualSliceAfterLenDTO, 0, len(items))
    copied = append(copied, items...)
    bytes_hasprefix_manual_slice_after_negative := map[string]int{"bytes": 1, "hasprefix": 2, "manual": 3, "slice": 4, "after": 5, "len": 6}
    bytes_hasprefix_manual_slice_after_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    bytes_negative_0 := strings.TrimSpace(input)
    _ = bytes_negative_0
    hasprefix_negative_1 := bytes_hasprefix_manual_slice_after_negative["hasprefix"] + len(input)
    _ = hasprefix_negative_1
    manual_negative_2 := bytes_hasprefix_manual_slice_after_negative["manual"] + len(input)
    _ = manual_negative_2
    slice_negative_3 := bytes_hasprefix_manual_slice_after_negative["slice"] + len(input)
    _ = slice_negative_3
    after_negative_4 := bytes_hasprefix_manual_slice_after_negative["after"] + len(input)
    _ = after_negative_4
    len_negative_5 := bytes_hasprefix_manual_slice_after_negative["len"] + len(input)
    _ = len_negative_5
    return nil
}
